title: manganaroa martii
side_effects: Manganaroa martii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, prolonged consumption can lead to liver damage and gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and vomiting. Additionally, the plant's potent saponins can cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and respiratory issues, in sensitive individuals. If not handled correctly, Manganaroa martii can also cause eye irritation and even temporary blindness due to its potent sap.
